# PHIL.200 ? Think Long-Term

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** operating_principles
**Subcategory:** think_long_term
**Domain:** OPERATING_PRINCIPLES
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Optimize for long-term value over short-term gains

## Application
Make multi-year bets, resist quarterly pressure, invest in future, build durable advantages
